name: A T & T Employees Pittsburgh
description_short: A T & T Employees Pittsburgh is a federally-insured credit union based in Pittsburgh, PA. Member-owned and not-for-profit, it provides everyday banking, lending, and savings services to its membership.
description_long: A T & T Employees Pittsburgh is a federal credit union serving members in , , established in 1935. As a not-for-profit financial cooperative, credit unions typically offer lower loan rates, higher savings rates, and fewer fees than traditional banks. The credit union operates 2 branch locations. Deposits are federally insured up to $250,000 by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA).
services: Personal loans (typically lower rates than banks)
pros: Not-for-profit — typically lower fees and better rates than banks
NCUA insured — deposits protected up to $250,000
cons: Membership requirements may apply (geographic, employer, or affiliation)
Fewer branches and ATMs than large banks
May have limited digital banking features
best_for: Lower fees and better loan rates than banks
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
address: Koppers Tower, 635 Grant St, Pittsburgh, PA 15219, USA
